response_body_utf8: {"version":"6.9","hitCount":1,"request":{"queryString":"EXT_ID:37867829 AND SRC:MED","internalQuery":"EXT_ID:37867829 AND SRC:MED","resultType":"CORE","cursorMark":"*","pageSize":5,"sort":"","synonym":false},"resultList":{"result":[{"id":"37867829","source":"MED","pmid":"37867829","pmcid":"PMC10587495","fullTextIdList":{"fullTextId":["PMC10587495"]},"doi":"10.1016/j.heliyon.2023.e20698","title":"On the utility of Colour in shape analysis: An introduction to Colour science via palaeographical case studies.","authorString":"Atanasiu V, Fornaro P.","authorList":{"author":[{"fullName":"Atanasiu V","firstName":"Vlad","lastName":"Atanasiu","initials":"V","authorId":{"type":"ORCID","value":"0000-0001-7457-7089"},"authorAffiliationDetailsList":{"authorAffiliation":[{"affiliation":"Department of Informatics, University of Fribourg, Boulevard de Pérolles 90, 1700, Fribourg, Switzerland."}]}},{"fullName":"Fornaro P","firstName":"Peter","lastName":"Fornaro","initials":"P","authorAffiliationDetailsList":{"authorAffiliation":[{"affiliation":"Digital Humanities Lab, University of Basel, Spalenberg 65, 4051, Basel, Switzerland."}]}}]},"authorIdList":{"authorId":[{"type":"ORCID","value":"0000-0001-7457-7089"}]},"journalInfo":{"issue":"10","volume":"9","journalIssueId":3639750,"dateOfPublication":"2023 Oct","monthOfPublication":10,"yearOfPublication":2023,"printPublicationDate":"2023-10-01","journal":{"title":"Heliyon","medlineAbbreviation":"Heliyon","isoabbreviation":"Heliyon","nlmid":"101672560","essn":"2405-8440","issn":"2405-8440"}},"pubYear":"2023","pageInfo":"e20698","abstractText":"In this article, we explore the use of colour for the analysis of shapes in digital images. We argue that colour can provide unique information that is not available from shape alone, and that familiarity with the interdisciplinary field of colour science is essential for unlocking the potential of colour. Within this perspective, we offer an illustrated overview of the colour-related aspects of image management and processing, perceptual psychology, and cultural studies, using for exemplary purposes case studies focused on computational palaeography. We also discuss the changing roles of colour in society and the sciences, and provide technical solutions for using digital colour effectively, highlighting the impact of human factors. The article concludes with an annotated bibliography. This work is a primer, and its intended readership are scholars and computer scientists unfamiliar with colour science.","affiliation":"Department of Informatics, University of Fribourg, Boulevard de Pérolles 90, 1700, Fribourg, Switzerland.","publicationStatus":"epublish","language":"eng","pubModel":"Electronic-eCollection","pubTypeList":{"pubType":["research-article","Journal Article"]},"grantsList":{"grant":[{"grantId":"PZ00P1_174149","agency":"Swiss National Science Foundation","orderIn":0},{"grantId":"174149","agency":"Swiss National Science Foundation","orderIn":0}]},"keywordList":{"keyword":["Image processing","image enhancement","Colour Perception","Colour Science","Colour Processing","Palaeography"]},"fullTextUrlList":{"fullTextUrl":[{"availability":"Subscription required","availabilityCode":"S","documentStyle":"doi","site":"DOI","url":"https://doi.org/10.1016/j.heliyon.2023.e20698"},{"availability":"Open access","availabilityCode":"OA","documentStyle":"html","site":"Europe_PMC","url":"https://europepmc.org/articles/PMC10587495"},{"availability":"Open access","availabilityCode":"OA","documentStyle":"pdf","site":"Europe_PMC","url":"https://europepmc.org/articles/PMC10587495?pdf=render"}]},"isOpenAccess":"Y","inEPMC":"Y","inPMC":"Y","hasPDF":"Y","hasBook":"N","hasSuppl":"N","citedByCount":0,"hasData":"N","hasReferences":"Y","hasTextMinedTerms":"Y","hasDbCrossReferences":"N","hasLabsLinks":"N","license":"cc by","hasEvaluations":"N","authMan":"N","epmcAuthMan":"N","nihAuthMan":"N","hasTMAccessionNumbers":"N","dateOfCreation":"2023-10-23","firstIndexDate":"2023-10-24","fullTextReceivedDate":"2023-10-26","dateOfRevision":"2023-10-30","electronicPublicationDate":"2023-10-10","firstPublicationDate":"2023-10-10"}]}}
